reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a target, giving Obsidia a safe target to tether or basic attack.
Obsidia can follow the displaced target with Hunt of Bone and Bone Shard pressure.

proof.summary: Kaja suppresses and drags the target, while Obsidia follows with tether and sustained ranged pressure.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a mobile or high-value target.
Obsidia is already close enough to follow.
failureCases: Obsidia is too far from the dragged target.
Enemy peel blocks Obsidia after suppression ends.

reasons: Kalea can grab and move a target into Obsidia's attack range.
Obsidia can use Kalea's forced-position setup to connect Hunt of Bone more reliably.

proof.summary: Kalea grabs and moves a target, while Obsidia follows with Hunt of Bone and Bone Shard pressure.
worksBestWhen: Kalea throws the target toward Obsidia.
Obsidia waits until Kalea confirms the displacement.
failureCases: Kalea throws the target away from Obsidia.
Obsidia chases too far after tethering.
Enemy burst reaches Obsidia before Kalea can peel.

reasons: Saber gives Obsidia a simple single-target airborne opener.
Obsidia can follow Saber's lock with tether and ranged damage if the target survives the first burst.

proof.summary: Saber locks a target airborne, while Obsidia follows with Hunt of Bone to continue the pickoff.
worksBestWhen: Saber targets a squishy or mobile damage dealer.
Obsidia stays close enough to follow after Triple Sweep.
failureCases: Saber uses ultimate on a tank.
Obsidia is too far to follow.
Enemy peel blocks Obsidia after Saber's burst.

reasons: Lolita protects Obsidia's basic-attack and tether window from ranged pressure.
Obsidia needs safe spacing to keep attacking, so frontline cover improves her damage uptime.

proof.summary: Lolita protects Obsidia's backline damage window after the pickoff or during front-to-back fights.
worksBestWhen: Lolita holds shield angle between Obsidia and enemy ranged damage.
Obsidia attacks from behind the protection instead of chasing early.
failureCases: Obsidia walks outside the protected angle.
Lolita's shield is unavailable during Obsidia's commit.

reasons: Zetian reveals and briefly controls targets globally, giving Obsidia a safer moment to choose a tether target.
Obsidia can use Zetian's global window to start Hunt of Bone with better target information.

proof.summary: Zetian reveals and briefly stuns targets globally, giving Obsidia a safer moment to choose a tether target.
worksBestWhen: Obsidia is already near enough to use the reveal.
The team protects Obsidia while she follows the tether.
failureCases: Obsidia is too far from the revealed target.
The enemy collapses on Obsidia after she commits.
Zetian's global ultimate is used without a follow-up path.
